# micromics

*micromics*is an R package designed to analyse and visualise microbiome
data derived from *QIIME2* output files in a streamlined and
reproducible manner. It simplifies the import and processing of *QIIME2*
artefacts and includes a normalisation step using biomass data to
convert read counts into biological estimates, such as cell equivalents
per millilitre of sample. This conversion allows for more accurate
interpretation and comparison of microbial abundance across different
samples.

## Installation

*micromics* is implemented in R (4.5.1). You can install *micromics*
using *devtools*:

``` r
# install.packages
devootls::install_github("stijnteunissen/micromics")
```

## License

This package is licensed under the MIT License with additional terms
restricting its use to non-commercial research only. See the
[LICENSE](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/LICENSE.md) file
for details.

## Citing micromics

Teunissen, S., van Veelen, H. P. J., Silvius, J. (2025). *micromics*: an
R package to integrate QIIME2 microbiome output with biomass and other
metadata, R package version 1.0.0, GitHub.
<https://github.com/stijnteunissen/micromics>.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`alpha_diversity()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/alpha_diversity.md)
  : Generate Alpha Diversity Plots
- [`barplot()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/barplot.md)
  : Create Barplots for Relative and Absolute Abundance
- [`beta_diversity()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/beta_diversity.md)
  : Generate Beta Diversity Ordination Plots
- [`create_folders()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/create_folders.md)
  : Create Project Folder Structure
- [`creating_physeq_object()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/creating_physeq_object.md)
  : Create a Phyloseq Object
- [`decontam()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/decontam.md)
  : Decontaminate a Phyloseq Object Using Specified Methods
- [`export_data()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/export_data.md)
  : Export Project Data to a Zip Archive
- [`group_tax()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/group_tax.md)
  : Aggregate Phyloseq Data by Taxonomic Level
- [`heatmap()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/heatmap.md)
  : Generate a Heatmap of Relative Abundance
- [`hello()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/hello.md)
  : Hello, world!
- [`normalise_data()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/normalise_data.md)
  : Normalize Phyloseq Data
- [`psdata_to_tibble()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/psdata_to_tibble.md)
  : Convert Phyloseq Data to Tibble and Export by Taxonomic Level
- [`rarefaction_curve()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/rarefaction_curve.md)
  : Generate and Save Rarefaction Curve
- [`rarefying()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/rarefying.md)
  : Rarefying Phyloseq Data
- [`remove_mock()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/remove_mock.md)
  : Remove Mock Features from a Phyloseq Object
- [`resolve_tree()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/resolve_tree.md)
  : Resolve Multichotomies in Phyloseq Object's Tree
- [`tax_clean()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/tax_clean.md)
  : Clean Taxonomy Table in Phyloseq Object
- [`unify_metadata()`](https://stijnteunissen.github.io/micromics/reference/unify_metadata.md)
  : Unify and Format Metadata
